__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    SseStream:
      path: /sse-stream
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        name: StreamRequest
        body:
          properties:
            query:
              type: optional<string>
              docs: The query to process
        content-type: application/json
      response-stream:
        docs: Server-sent events stream
        type: SseStreamEvent
        format: sse
      examples:
        - request: {}
          response:
            stream:
              - event: ''
                data:
                  content: content
                  event: completion
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  SseStreamEvent:
    discriminant:
      value: event
      context: protocol
    base-properties: {}
    union:
      completion: CompletionEvent
      error: ErrorEvent
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CompletionEvent:
    properties:
      content:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: The completion content
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ErrorEvent:
    properties:
      error:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: The error message
      code:
        type: optional<integer>
        docs: The error code
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  DataLevelUnion:
    discriminant:
      value: type
      context: data
    base-properties: {}
    union:
      user: UserData
      admin: AdminData
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  UserData:
    properties:
      username: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  AdminData:
    properties:
      username: optional<string>
      permissions: optional<list<string>>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

contents.display-name: Test spec for discriminator context extension
contents.name: api

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Test spec for discriminator context extension
